reference: HARK YOU MY MASTERS YOU THAT LOVE THE WINE COP'S BODY FOLLOW ME FOR SANCT ANTHONY BURN ME AS FREELY AS A FAGGOT IF THEY GET LEAVE TO TASTE ONE DROP OF THE LIQUOR THAT WILL NOT NOW COME AND FIGHT FOR RELIEF OF THE VINE
text: Hark, you, my masters, you that love the wine. Cop's body, follow me, for Saint Anthony burn me as freely as a faggot. If they get leave to taste one drop of the liquor, that will not now come and fight for relief of the vine.
